description:
Your friendly home app

Be nice is a slick, beautiful Android launcher built with Jetpack Compose.

It started as a tool to launch apps in split-screen mode to avoid forced rotation on tablets and foldables, and has evolved into a full-featured home screen replacement.

Key features

  • Modern design: Built entirely with Jetpack Compose and Material 3 Expressive for a smooth and responsive experience.
  • Split-screen utility: Launch two apps side by side to multitask effectively and prevent unwanted screen rotation (when the system allows it).
  • App pairs: Create shortcuts to launch two apps side by side instantly, even on phones, tablets, and foldables.
  • Folders: Organize your apps into groups to find them easier and faster.
  • Hidden items: Optionally hide apps added to folders; they move into a dedicated Hidden items folder that you can manage from Settings.
  • Widgets: Add up to two widgets to the Favorites and widgets page for at-a-glance information.
  • Configurable dock: Customize the dock on the Favorites and widgets page to launch the phone, messages, browser, or your favorite apps with a single tap.

Whether you need a full replacement for your home screen or just a better way to multitask, Be nice adapts to you.
